prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Alright, let's tackle this head-on! Remember, procrastination is just a temporary relief that often leads to more stress. You've got this! Break the task into smaller, manageable parts and focus on one at a time. Every step you take brings you closer to completion. And don't forget, the hardest part is starting. Once you get going, you'll find your rhythm and momentum. You're capable, you're determined, and you're going to crush this task. Let's get started!
